title: BGISEQ-500 WGS Library Construction
author: Jie Huang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ps5dng6

steps.title: Input genomic DNA sample Genomic DNA...
steps.instruction: Input genomic DNA sample Genomic DNA Sample Recommendation %s %s *High-quality genomic DNA should be free of salt or organics. It could run as an intact band with DNA length >23kb during 1% agarose gel electrophoresis

steps.title: Fragmentation Use the Covaris Focused-ultrasonicator for...
steps.instruction: Fragmentation Use the Covaris Focused-ultrasonicator for genomic DNA fragmentation following the instructions of the instrument. Optimisation should be performed on DNA prior to experiment and analyzed with agarose electrophoresis or an Agilent 2100 BioAnalyzer %s %s

steps.title: Bead-based Cleanup Place AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Bead-based Cleanup Place AMPure XP magnetic beads at RT for 30 min, fully thaw before use. PE

steps.title: Pipette 48 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 48 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 80 μL shearing product, and mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, incubate for 5min at room temperature. ( PE

steps.title: Pipette 80 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 80 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 80 μL shearing product, and mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, incubate for 5min at room temperature. PE

steps.title: Pipette 44 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 44 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 80 μL shearing product, and mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, incubate for 5min at room temperature. ) After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2min until the liquid clears, carefully transfer the supernatant to a new non-stick tube with a pipette. PE

steps.title: Pipette 16 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 16 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 128 μL supernatant, mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, and incubate at room-temperature for 5 min. ( PE

steps.title: Pipette 40 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 40 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 160 μL supernatant, mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, and incubate at room-temperature for 5 min. PE

steps.title: Pipette 12 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 12 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to 124 μL supernatant, mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, and incubate at room-temperature for 5 min.) After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2min until the liquid clears, remove and discard the supernatant with a pipette. Add 500 μL of fresh 80% ethanol, while the tube remains on the magnet, then, rotate the tubes in the rack by half turns 4 times to wash the beads then carefully remove and discard the supernatant after 1 min. Repeat step 6 once, and remove all liquid from tube without disrupting the beads.

steps.title: Homogenization Use double-strand DNA quantification kit...
steps.instruction: Homogenization Use double-strand DNA quantification kit such as Qubit® dsDNA HS Assay Kit or Quant-iT™ PicoGreen® dsDNA Assay Kit, and quantify the sample as per the instructions of the quantification kit.

steps.title: Remove 50 ng of sample (calculated...
steps.instruction: Remove 50 ng of sample (calculated based on its concentration) to a new 0.2 mL PCR tube, and add NF water to final volume of 40 μL. 00:30:00, 3）1 00:05:00, 3）2 00:02:00, 3）3 00:05:00, 3）4 00:02:00, 3）5 00:01:00, 3）6 00:01:00, 3）7 Fresh 80% ethanol XILONG SCIENTIFIC

steps.title: Prepare the mixture as follows in...
steps.instruction: Prepare the mixture as follows in PCR tube (do not vortex enzymes): %s %s

steps.title: Mix well by gently pipetting (Do...
steps.instruction: Mix well by gently pipetting (Do not mix by vortexing), concentrate the reaction liquid to tube bottom by brief centrifugation.

steps.title: Place the PCR tube containing the...
steps.instruction: Place the PCR tube containing the reaction mixture of above step in a Thermal Cycler, and initiate the reaction as per the following conditions: %s %s 00:45:00, 3） ERAT Buffer Contributed by users ERAT Enzyme Contributed by users

steps.title: Add 5 μL of Adapter Mix...
steps.instruction: Add 5 μL of Adapter Mix to above PCR tube, and mix well by pipetting. Now 16 Adapter Mix are available, 8 libraries in one lane strategy, every sample with 4 different barcodes.

steps.title: Prepare the following reaction mixture (Note
steps.instruction: Prepare the following reaction mixture (Note: Ligation Buffer II is viscous, pipette slowly): %s %s

steps.title: Add 25 μL of above reaction...
steps.instruction: Add 25 μL of above reaction mixture to the reaction solution containing adapters from above step.

steps.title: Place the tube in a Thermal...
steps.instruction: Place the tube in a Thermal Cycler, then initiate reaction as per following condition: %s %s

steps.title: After ligation, add 20 μL TE...
steps.instruction: After ligation, add 20 μL TE to final volume of 100 μL, then transfer entire volume to a non-stick tube containing 50 uL of room temperature AMPure beads and mix by slow pipetting 10 times to avoid bubble formation. 00:30:00, 4） Adapter Mix Contributed by users Ligation Buffer Contributed by users Ligation Enzyme Contributed by users TE buffer Ambion

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, remove and discard the supernatant with a pipette:

steps.title: Add 500 μL of fresh 80%...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of fresh 80% ethanol, while the tube remains on the magnet, then, rotate the tubes in the rack by half turns 4 times to wash the beads. Carefully remove and discard the supernatant after 1 min.

steps.title: once, remove all liquid from tube without disrupting the beads
steps.instruction: once, remove all liquid from tube without disrupting the beads.

steps.title: Open the cap of non-stick tube,...
steps.instruction: Open the cap of non-stick tube, while the tube remains on the magnet, and dry at room temperature for 3 min.

steps.title: Remove the non-stick tube from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the non-stick tube from the magnet, add 46 μL of TE for DNA elution, mix well by pipetting and incubate at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, transfer all 44 μL of supernatant to a new 0.2 mL PCR tube ready for PCR in next step, or store at -20℃. 00:05:00, 1） 00:02:00, 2） 00:01:00, 3） 00:03:00, 5） 00:05:00, 6） 00:02:00, 7）

steps.title: 1) %s %s 2) Place above...
steps.instruction: 1) %s %s 2) Place above PCR tube in a Thermal Cycler, and the initiate the reaction as per following conditions: %s %s 00:15:50, 2） PCR Enzyme Mix Contributed by users

steps.title: Place AMPure XP magnetic beads at...
steps.instruction: Place AMPure XP magnetic beads at room temperature 30 min in advance, mix well by vortexing before use.

steps.title: Add 100 μL of AMPure XP...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μL of AMPure XP magnetic beads to 100 μL of PCR product, mix well by gently pipetting 10 times, and incubate at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, remove and discard the supernatant with a pipette.

steps.title: Add 500 μL of fresh 80%...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of fresh 80% ethanol, while the tube remains on the magnet, then, rotate the tubes in the rack by half turns 4 times to wash the beads. Carefully remove and discard the supernatant after 1 min.

steps.title: once, and try to suck up...
steps.instruction: once, and try to suck up all liquid from tube bottom.

steps.title: Open the cap of non-stick tube,...
steps.instruction: Open the cap of non-stick tube, while the tube remains on the magnet, and dry at room temperature for 3 min.

steps.title: Remove the non-stick tube from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the non-stick tube from the magnet, add 32 μL of TE water for DNA elution, mix well by pipetting and incubate at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, transfer the supernatant to a new non-stick tube. Proceed next step reaction or store at -20℃. 00:30:00, 1） 00:05:00, 2） 00:02:00, 3） 00:01:00, 4） 00:01:00, 5） 00:03:00, 6） 00:05:00, 7） 00:02:00, 8）

steps.title: 1）Use double-strand DNA quantification kit such...
steps.instruction: 1）Use double-strand DNA quantification kit such as Qubit® dsDNA HS Assay Kit or Quant-iT™ PicoGreen® dsDNA Assay Kit, and quantify the sample as per the instructions of the quantification kit. 2）It is recommended to mix samples of different Barcodes here. 3）Add mixed sample (calculated based on its concentration) to a PCR tube, and add NF water to final volume of 48 μL.

steps.title: Prepare reaction mixture on ice as per following system
steps.instruction: Prepare reaction mixture on ice as per following system: %s %s

steps.title: Add 11
steps.instruction: Add 11.8 μL of above reaction mixture to 48 μL of denatured DNA.

steps.title: Place above PCR tube in a...
steps.instruction: Place above PCR tube in a Thermal Cycler, and initiate the reaction as per following conditions: %s %s 00:03:00, 1） 00:30:00, 4） Splint Buffer Contributed by users

steps.title: Prepare digestion reaction solution on ice...
steps.instruction: Prepare digestion reaction solution on ice as per following system: %s %s

steps.title: After the circularization reaction is finished,...
steps.instruction: After the circularization reaction is finished, directly add 4 μL of digestion reaction solution into circularized DNA solution, mix well and briefly centrifuge, then place the PCR tube in a Thermal Cycler, and initiate the reaction as per following conditions: %s %s

steps.title: Add 7
steps.instruction: Add 7.5 μL of Digestion Stop Buffer to each reaction, mix well to terminate the reaction.

steps.title: Transfer all the reaction solution to...
steps.instruction: Transfer all the reaction solution to a new non-stick tube, ready for purification. 00:30:00, 2） Digestion Buffer Contributed by users Digestion Enzyme Contributed by users

steps.title: Place AMPure XP magnetic beads and...
steps.instruction: Place AMPure XP magnetic beads and place at room temperature for 30 min in advance. Mix well by vortexing before use.

steps.title: Pipette 168 μL AMPure XP magnetic...
steps.instruction: Pipette 168 μL AMPure XP magnetic beads to digestion product, mix well by pipetting 10 times, and incubate at room temperature for 10 min.

steps.title: After transient centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After transient centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, remove and discard the supernatant with a pipette:

steps.title: Add 500 μL of fresh 80%...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of fresh 80% ethanol, while the tube remains on the magnet, then, rotate the tubes in the rack by half turns 4 times to wash the beads. Carefully remove and discard the supernatant after 1 min.

steps.title: once, and try to suck up...
steps.instruction: once, and try to suck up all liquid from tube bottom.

steps.title: Open the cap of non-stick tube,...
steps.instruction: Open the cap of non-stick tube, while the tube remains on the magnet, and dry at room temperature for 3 min.

steps.title: Remove the non-stick tube from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the non-stick tube from the magnet, add 32 μL of TE for DNA elution, mix well by pipetting and incubate at room temperature for 10 min.

steps.title: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick...
steps.instruction: After brief centrifugation, place the non-stick tube on the magnet for 2 min until the liquid clears, transfer the supernatant to a new non-stick tube.
